raw_transcript: It was terrifying, Dr. Chen. I was eating a piece of steak, and it just... stopped. Right at the bottom of my throat. I couldn't swallow my spit, and I felt like I was going to choke. It took about two hours of drinking water and jumping up and down before it finally passed.
final_corrected_note: It was terrifying, Dr. Chen. I was eating a piece of steak, and it just... stopped. Right at the bottom of my throat. I couldn't swallow my spit, and I felt like I was going to choke. It took about two hours of drinking water and jumping up and down before it finally passed.
